sub_modules.fp_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 operand unpacking, effective subtraction sign application, significand extraction, and basic classification.
sub_modules.fp_special: Combinational handling for NaNs, infinities, signed zero cases, and one-zero operand forwarding.
sub_modules.fp_align: Combinational operand magnitude ordering, exponent difference calculation, significand alignment, and sticky-bit generation.
sub_modules.fp_addsub_significands: Combinational signed significand addition or subtraction using the aligned operands.
sub_modules.fp_normalize: Combinational post-add normalization with carry handling and left normalization after cancellation.
sub_modules.fp_round_pack: Combinational round-to-nearest-even logic and IEEE-754 result packing with overflow and zero handling.
